sql_array: CREATE TABLE fuzz_test (id UInt32, original_value String, fuzzed_value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE fuzz_test SET fuzzed_value = fuzzBits(original_value, 0.5) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, original_value, fuzzBits(original_value, 0.3) AS fuzzed_value FROM fuzz_test;
SELECT id, fuzzBits(original_value, 0.1) FROM fuzz_test WHERE fuzzed_value IS NOT NULL;
